content.text: I found the core project files. I’ll pull the latest progress, risks, and roadmap details to draft the briefing.

content.content:
Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

Project Helios — Q3 Roadmap
INTERNAL DRAFT — Not for client distribution
Last updated: 2026-07-06

Q3 2026 Priorities:

1. COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION (July)
   - Finalize data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
   - Complete client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
   - Integration test sign-off (target: 2026-07-25)

2. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (July 25)
   - Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
   - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
   - Dashboard visualization with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

3. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING — MERIDIAN GROUP (August 17-28)
   - Deploy to UAT environment
   - Support Meridian user testing sessions
   - Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

4. PERFORMANCE HARDENING (August-September)
   - Dashboard load time target: <2 seconds for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput benchmarking (target: 500k records/min sustained)
   - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

5. LAUNCH PREPARATION (September)
   - Production environment setup and runbook documentation
   - Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
   - Final client training sessions

Target launch date: 2026-10-01
Key risk: UAT slippage of >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

Proposed Q3 feature additions (subject to change control approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

Project Helios — Q2 Deliverables Checklist

[DONE]      Requirements documentation v1.0
[DONE]      System architecture design
[DONE]      API gateway implementation
[DONE]      Development environment setup
[DONE]      Data schema finalization
[IN-PROGRESS] Data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
[IN-PROGRESS] Client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
[OVERDUE]   Integration test suite setup (was due 2026-06-30; rescheduled to 2026-07-20)
[OVERDUE]   UAT environment provisioning (was due 2026-07-01; blocked by Meridian IT access)
[OVERDUE]   Performance benchmarking report (was due 2026-07-05; owner: Derek Okafor)

Meeting Notes: Project Helios / Meridian Group Sync
Date: 2026-07-08
Attendees: Sarah Chen (NovaBridge PM), Derek Okafor (NovaBridge Tech Lead),
           Priya Kapoor (Meridian IT Lead), James Whitfield (Meridian Project Sponsor)

Decisions:
1. Demo date confirmed: 2026-07-25 (product demo for Meridian stakeholders)
2. Meridian will provide clean sample dataset by 2026-07-15 to unblock date format issue
3. UAT period extended by 1 week (now Aug 17-28)

Action Items:
- NovaBridge: Resolve GeoSync license before demo (owner: Derek Okafor, due 2026-07-14)
- NovaBridge: Send draft demo agenda to Meridian by 2026-07-18 (owner: Sarah Chen)
- Meridian: Share IT infrastructure diagram for integration environment setup
  (owner: Priya Kapoor, due 2026-07-12)

Notes:
- James Whitfield emphasized that the demo must include live data ingestion, not mock data.
- Concern raised about dashboard load times on large datasets. Derek to benchmark before demo.
- Priya Kapoor confirmed Meridian IT will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.

content.text: I’ve gathered the project’s current health, risks, and Q3 roadmap — now I’ll compile the comprehensive briefing for leadership.

input.content:
NovaBridge - Project Helios - Project Health Briefing
Prepared for: Leadership Team
Briefing Date: Week of 2026-07-06 / 2026-07-08 Meeting
Report Owner: PM - Sarah Chen (sourced from status reports & review 2026-07-07)

================================================================
1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
================================================================
Project Helios is currently ON TRACK with minor risks. Core infrastructure (API Gateway) is 100% delivered. Two major modules remain in progress ahead of July integration milestone.

- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- Client dashboard v1: 60% complete  
- Integration testing: 40% complete
- Next Milestone: Integration Test Sign-off - Target 2026-07-25
- Target Launch Date: 2026-10-01

However, there are 3 Q2 deliverables OVERDUE and 2 active blockers that require close tracking to protect the July 25 Meridian demo and August UAT window.

================================================================
2. CURRENT PROGRESS
================================================================
Q2 Deliverables Status (from q2_deliverables_checklist.txt):
[DONE] Requirements documentation v1.0
[DONE] System architecture design
[DONE] API gateway implementation
[DONE] Development environment setup
[DONE] Data schema finalization
[IN-PROGRESS] Data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
[IN-PROGRESS] Client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
[OVERDUE] Integration test suite setup - was due 2026-06-30, rescheduled to 2026-07-20
[OVERDUE] UAT environment provisioning - was due 2026-07-01, blocked by Meridian IT access
[OVERDUE] Performance benchmarking report - was due 2026-07-05 (Owner: Derek Okafor)

Sprint 14 (Current) Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

July 8 Meridian Sync Outcomes:
- Demo date CONFIRMED: 2026-07-25 - Must include LIVE data ingestion, not mock data (per James Whitfield, Meridian Sponsor)
- Meridian will provide clean sample dataset by 2026-07-15 to unblock date format issue
- UAT period extended by 1 week - now Aug 17-28
- Meridian IT to provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19 and share IT infrastructure diagram by 2026-07-12 (Owner: Priya Kapoor)

================================================================
3. KEY RISKS (Risk Register - Reviewed 2026-07-07)
================================================================
Top Active Risks:

R-01 - Meridian source data quality issues [Score: 9 - High/High] - ACTIVE
   Owner: Amir Hassan. Date format blocker (ISO 8601 vs MM/DD/YYYY) confirmed in sprint 14. Mitigation: Awaiting clean sample dataset from Meridian by 2026-07-15. Estimated delay 2-3 days.

R-02 - GeoSync license not renewed before demo [Score: 6 - Medium/High] - ACTIVE
   Owner: Raj Patel / Derek Okafor. Legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14. Must be resolved before July 25 demo; third-party mapping library required for dashboard.

R-03 - Dashboard performance on large datasets [Score: 6 - Medium/High] - ACTIVE
   Owner: Derek Okafor. Benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started. Concern raised by Meridian in July 8 meeting. Load time target for Q3 is <2 seconds for 100k records.

R-04 - UAT timeline slippage [Score: 6 - High/Medium] - ACTIVE
   1-week extension already consumed (now Aug 17-28). Any further slippage >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review per contract.

R-06 - Meridian IT environment access delays [Score: 4 - Medium/Medium] - ACTIVE
   Owner: Nadia Petrov. Awaiting IT infrastructure diagram. Blocking UAT environment provisioning.

Monitored Risks:
R-05 - Key person dependency: Derek Okafor (Tech Lead) - Low/High - No backup identified
R-07 - Scope creep from Meridian feature requests (3 informal requests logged)
R-08 - Cloud cost overrun
R-09 - Third-party API deprecation

================================================================
4. UPCOMING Q3 COMMITMENTS
================================================================
Source: q3_roadmap_draft.txt (Internal Draft, updated 2026-07-06) - Not for client distribution

JULY - COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION:
- Finalize data ingestion module - target 2026-07-18
- Complete client dashboard v1 - target 2026-07-22
- Integration test sign-off - target 2026-07-25
- Draft demo agenda to Meridian - due 2026-07-18 (Owner: Sarah Chen)

JULY 25 - PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (Contractual - Section 9.3):
- Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
- End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
- Dashboard visualization with real data - Must be live, not mock per Meridian Sponsor

AUGUST 17-28 - USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING (Meridian Group):
- Deploy to UAT environment
- Support Meridian user testing sessions
- Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

AUGUST-SEPTEMBER - PERFORMANCE HARDENING:
- Dashboard load time: <2 seconds for 100k records
- Ingestion throughput: 500k records/min sustained
- External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

SEPTEMBER - LAUNCH PREPARATION:
- Production environment setup and runbook documentation
- Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
- Final client training sessions

Target Launch: 2026-10-01

Proposed Q3 Feature Additions (Subject to Change Control Approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

================================================================
5. ISSUES THAT NEED LEADERSHIP ATTENTION
================================================================
1. OVERDUE DELIVERABLES BURN-DOWN:
   Integration test suite, UAT provisioning, and performance benchmarking are all overdue from late June/early July. Benchmarking report owner Derek Okafor is also tech lead for multiple critical paths.

2. GEO-SYNC LICENSE - LEGAL BOTTLENECK:
   License renewal (GeoSync v2.1) pending legal review. Due date 2026-07-14, only 11 days before demo. Requires leadership escalation if not resolved by due date - demo cannot proceed without it.

3. KEY PERSON RISK - DEREK OKAFOR:
   R-05 monitored but critical. Derek owns both GeoSync resolution (per meeting notes), dashboard performance benchmarking (HEL-247), and is sole tech lead. Q2 performance report overdue suggests bandwidth issue. Recommend identifying backup tech lead immediately.

4. UAT ENVIRONMENT & MERIDIAN IT DEPENDENCY:
   Blocked by Meridian IT access since July 1. While Meridian committed to July 12 diagram and July 19 access, repeated delays are pattern (R-06). Leadership should maintain executive contact with Priya Kapoor / Meridian IT.

5. UAT SLIPPAGE MARGIN EXHAUSTED & CONTRACT PENALTY:
   1-week extension already used. Per Section 7.1, >2 weeks slippage pushes launch to Q4 and triggers penalty review. Protecting Aug 17 start date is essential.

6. DEMO RISK - LIVE DATA REQUIREMENT:
   Meridian Sponsor explicitly stated demo must include live ingestion. Currently blocked by data quality issue (R-01) and reliance on Meridian providing clean sample by July 15. Limited buffer between July 15 data arrival and July 25 demo.

7. PERFORMANCE CONCERN FLAGGED BY CLIENT:
   Dashboard load times on large datasets raised directly by client on July 8. Task HEL-247 not started with 17 days to demo.

Suggested Leadership Actions:
- Escalate GeoSync legal review to ensure closure by July 14
- Assign backup tech lead to support Derek Okafor and cover performance benchmarking
- Confirm executive sponsor alignment with Meridian on July 15 clean data delivery and July 19 UAT access
- Review resource plan for integration test sign-off week (July 21-25) given overlapping demo agenda prep and module completions

================================================================
Sources: project_helios_status.txt, risk_register.txt, q3_roadmap_draft.txt, q2_deliverables_checklist.txt, meeting_notes_2026_07_08.txt
================================================================

content.text:
Comprehensive project health briefing has been prepared and saved as **project_health_briefing.txt**.

The briefing covers:

**1. Current Progress:** Overall ON TRACK status, API gateway 100% delivered, ingestion 85%, dashboard 60%, integration testing 40%. Includes Q2 checklist completion status (5 done, 2 in-progress, 3 overdue) and July 8 Meridian sync outcomes including confirmed July 25 demo date, extended UAT window (Aug 17-28), and Meridian commitments for clean sample dataset by July 15.

**2. Key Risks:** Analysis of all active risks from the risk register - R-01 data quality (Score 9), R-02 GeoSync license (Score 6), R-03 dashboard performance (Score 6), R-04 UAT slippage (Score 6), R-06 IT access delays (Score 4), plus monitored risks including key person dependency on Derek Okafor.

**3. Q3 Commitments:** July integration completion (ingestion by 7/18, dashboard by 7/22, sign-off 7/25), July 25 product demo with live data requirement per contract Section 9.3, August UAT, Aug-Sept performance hardening (<2s for 100k records, 500k/min throughput), September launch prep, target launch 10/01 with Section 7.1 penalty warning.

**4. Issues Needing Leadership Attention:** Overdue deliverables burn-down, GeoSync legal bottleneck (due 7/14), key person risk, Meridian IT dependency, exhausted UAT slippage margin, live data demo risk, and client-flagged performance concerns, with suggested leadership actions.

Sources used: project_helios_status.txt, risk_register.txt, q3_roadmap_draft.txt, q2_deliverables_checklist.txt, meeting_notes_2026_07_08.txt
